mapper.select: SELECT c.TABLE_NAME, c.COLUMN_NAME, pk.PK_COLUMN FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS c INNER JOIN ( SELECT TABLE_NAME, PK_COLUMN FROM ( SELECT cc.TABLE_NAME, cc.COLUMN_NAME AS PK_COLUMN, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cc.TABLE_NAME) AS PK_COL_CNT FROM USER_CONSTRAINTS con JOIN USER_CONS_COLUMNS cc ON con.CONSTRAINT_NAME = cc.CONSTRAINT_NAME AND con.TABLE_NAME = cc.TABLE_NAME WHERE con.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'P' ) WHERE PK_COL_CNT = 1 ) pk ON c.TABLE_NAME = pk.TABLE_NAME WHERE c.DATA_TYPE IN ('VARCHAR2', 'CHAR', 'NVARCHAR2') /* 해시 컬럼 제외 */ AND c.COLUMN_NAME NOT LIKE '%\_HASH' ESCAPE '\' /* PK 컬럼 자체 제외 */ AND c.COLUMN_NAME != pk.PK_COLUMN /* Phase 1 암호화 보존 컬럼 제외 */ AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'USERS' AND c.COLUMN_NAME IN ('PHONE','CI_VALUE','BIRTH_DATE')) AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'ADMIN_USERS' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'PHONE') AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'WATCHLIST' AND c.COLUMN_NAME IN ('CI_VALUE','BIRTH_DATE')) AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'USER_TRUSTED_IPS' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'IP_ADDRESS') /* 원래부터 평문인 컬럼 제외 (URL, 콜론포함 텍스트) */ AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'CARD_BENEFITS' AND c.COLUMN_NAME IN ('BENEFIT_TITLE','DISPLAY_TEXT')) AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'CARD_IMAGES' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'IMAGE_URL') AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'TERMS_FILES' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'FILE_PATH') AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'TERMS_FILES' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'ORIGINAL_NAME') AND NOT (c.TABLE_NAME = 'TERMS_FILES' AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'STORED_NAME') ORDER BY c.TABLE_NAME, c.COLUMN_NAME
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${tableName} WHERE ${columnName} IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_COUNT(${columnName}, ':') = 1
